description.ko: 생물학적 우아함과 컴퓨팅의 복잡성이 결합된 디지털 네이처 시리즈의 표본, 플로라-9의 형상입니다. 데이터 스트림과 함께 고동치는 빛나는 핵은 기술과 유기적 생명이 구별되지 않는 미래를 투영합니다.
description.en: A representation of FLORA-9, a specimen from the digital nature series where biological elegance meets computational complexity. Its glowing core pulses with data streams, reflecting a future where technology and organic life are indistinguishable.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro shot of FLORA-9, a bioluminescent digital plant with translucent glass-like petals containing glowing fiber-optic veins, circuit board patterns etched onto emerald crystalline leaves, floating in a dark void with floating neon pollen particles, soft volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, cinematic digital nature aesthetic.
